title: Warm up
content: The slide displays images representing Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. These images show people driving through these cities, each characterized by distinct local elements.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This slide introduces the theme 'An Evolving Nation', focusing on a journey through China. It highlights significant urban and cultural landscapes across major cities.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The slide outlines the investigation into local features, development strategies, and their outcomes. This is part of an effort to understand city development chains.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide matches cities to their strategic development focus areas. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide illustrates different development strategies observed by taxi drivers. Each city develops its strategies based on local features to foster growth.
